macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Mixed on Tuesday Amid Iran War Uncertainty
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 0.2% to 6,781.48, Dow slipped 0.1% to 47,706.51, Nasdaq was flat at 22,697.10, and Russell 2000 dropped 0.2% to 2,548.08 as investors awaited signals on the US-Iran war end; oil prices pulled back from $90 after plunging from $120 on de-escalation hopes.[1]

items.title: Weekly Gains Persist Despite Tuesday Dip
items.summary: For the week, S&P 500 up 0.6%, Dow up 0.4%, Nasdaq up 1.4%, Russell 2000 up 0.9%; year-to-date, S&P down 0.9%, Dow down 0.7%, Nasdaq down 2.3%, Russell up 2.7%.[1]

items.title: March Market Insights: Geopolitical Tensions and AI Fears Impact Stocks
items.summary: US stocks faced pressure from Middle East tensions and AI disruption fears unsettling investors across industries; earlier CPI data showed slowing inflation, aiding a modest rebound.[2]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Prediction Markets Bet on US Stablecoin Bill Passing Before Midterms
items.summary: Discussions indicate the stablecoin bill is likely to pass before Labor Day or midterms, despite delays over yield issues, with prediction markets favoring approval. Failure could occur if Democrats gain House control post-midterms.
items.source: YouTube - Trump Signals War Over? Crypto Market Update

items.title: Clarity Act Awaited for Crypto Regulation Progress
items.summary: Market watchers anticipate the Clarity Act to provide regulatory clarity, highlighted alongside positive project perspectives amid reducing red indicators.
items.source: YouTube - March 11, 2026 US CPI Crypto Update

items.title: Stablecoins Gain Traction at Major Conferences with DTCC Role
items.summary: Over 2000 attendees at a conference emphasized stablecoins' capital efficiency and use cases, with DTCC unlocking inventory for broader access amid growing acceptance.

items.title: Circle Shares Climb Amid Crypto Market Movements
items.summary: Circle's stock is rising alongside broader market gains, as strategists note well-functioning exchange plumbing during volatile days.

items.title: Elon Musk Confirms X Money Beta Testing for April Public Launch
items.summary: X (formerly Twitter) is internally beta testing X Money, set to open to the public as early as April, potentially impacting crypto sentiment.
items.source: YouTube - March 11, 2026 US CPI Crypto Update

items.title: Bitcoin and Altcoins Face Key Resistance Rejections
items.summary: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and Chainlink are rejecting from crucial short-term resistance levels, with potential relief bounces but ongoing downtrends signaled.
items.source: YouTube - Bitcoin News Today, Ethereum & Altcoins

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 with Native Computer Use Capabilities
items.summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.4, marking a significant milestone in the 'Agentic Pivot' where AI models now execute complex, multi-step workflows within professional software environments and physical hardware systems, moving beyond text generation.

items.title: Anthropic's Claude 4.6 Series Advances Agentic AI Capabilities
items.summary: Anthropic has released the Claude 4.6 series as part of the broader 'Agentic Pivot,' enabling models to perform complex workflows in professional and physical environments alongside OpenAI's GPT-5.4.

items.title: MIT Develops Vision-Language AI Framework for Complex Visual Planning Tasks
items.summary: MIT researchers created VLMFP, a generative AI approach for planning long-term visual tasks like robot navigation, achieving 60% success on 2D tasks and over 80% on 3D tasks including robotic assembly and multi-robot collaboration.

items.title: USC Study Shows AI Can Learn Beyond Training Data Limitations
items.summary: A USC Viterbi School of Engineering study accepted at IEEE SoutheastCon 2026 demonstrates that AI models can dramatically improve performance in untrained territory, achieving 96% improvement through iterative recompilation methods.

items.title: Researchers Reconstruct Animal Perception from Brain Activity Using AI
items.summary: Scientists at the University of Hawaii and elsewhere have used AI to reconstruct short movies from mouse brain activity, advancing neural decoding technology with implications for understanding animal consciousness and potential human applications.

items.title: Physics-Informed Machine Learning Accelerates Material Science Discovery
items.summary: New AI algorithms using physics-informed loss functions have reduced high-pressure chemical simulations from months to days, accelerating discovery of new high-density materials for energy and aerospace applications.

items.title: Inturai Advances AI-Native Infrastructure for Tactical Applications
items.summary: Inturai Ventures announced its AI-native operating model that uses AI-assisted coding and automated testing to accelerate development cycles, positioning itself as a scalable platform across healthcare, defense, and industrial markets.

items.title: Datavault AI Addresses AI-Generated Content Rights and Royalty Management
items.summary: Datavault AI's platform converts post-strike contract commitments into technical guarantees for artist consent and compensation, enabling permissioned NIL usage with automatic on-chain royalty routing and immutable rights agreements.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Runaway Studio's Hatch Dragons Tops US Apple App Store
items.summary: Ōtepoti-based studio Runaway released mobile title Hatch Dragons, which garnered over one million pre-orders and reached No. 1 on the US Apple App Store within 24 hours. The cosy fantasy game involves hatching dragons and restoring a forest, available on iOS and Android.

items.title: Space Rock Games Releases Doomsday Diner Demo
items.summary: Tāmaki Makaurau-based Space Rock Games launched a demo for upcoming title Doomsday Diner, featured by IGN and Women in Games, attracting over 5000 Steam wishlists. Full release planned later this year.

items.title: Snail Games Announces GDC 2026 Updates and Reveals
items.summary: Snail Games kicked off GDC 2026 with franchise updates including ARK expansions, a new indie game announcement, and Bellwright reaching 1 million players.

items.title: Kaizen Gaming Acquires AI Sports Trading Firm GameplAI
items.summary: GameTech company Kaizen Gaming acquired GameplAI on March 10, 2026, to advance AI-driven sports trading and analytics innovations.

items.title: Falcom to Announce New Trails Game in 2031
items.summary: Nihon Falcom announced on March 11, 2026, that a new Trails series video game will be revealed in 2031 for the company's 50th anniversary.

items.title: NetEase Faces Challenges in Games Industry Roundup
items.summary: March 10, 2026 roundup highlights a tough week for the video game industry, with major Chinese publisher NetEase encountering difficulties amid broader sector struggles.

items.title: Esports Evolves from Sport to Creative Industry
items.summary: A March 11, 2026 report discusses the transformation of esports into a professional creative industry beyond traditional sports.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
